changes.before: On the farms two days back, Sylvanas would have called that scholar's caution.
changes.after: On the farms on the ride in, Sylvanas would have called that scholar's caution.

changes.before: Millhaven emptied. Sixty-plus reanimated moving NNE in column toward Thalassian border. Contamination confirmed in water, soil, grain stores.
changes.after: Millhaven emptied. Sixty-plus reanimated moving NNE in column toward Thalassian border. Contamination confirmed across water, soil, and the village itself; granary read strongest, source still uncertain.
